title: Slovakian Potato Dumplings
description: Hearty and comforting potato dumplings in a traditional Slovakian style. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Boil the potatoes in salted water until tender. Drain and mash.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour, melted butter, eggs, salt, and pepper. Mix until a dough forms.
Add the mashed potatoes to the dough and mix until well combined.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a large skillet with a little bit of oil over medium heat. Fry the dumplings until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and garlic.
